sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, val String, num Float64, dt DateTime, uuid UUID) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

SELECT id, reinterpretAsUInt64(num) AS reinterpreted_num FROM fuzz_test WHERE reinterpretAsUInt64(num) = ALL (SELECT reinterpretAsUInt64(NULLIF(num, 0)) FROM fuzz_test WHERE dt > '2023-01-01 00:00:00');

SELECT id, reinterpretAsUInt64(val) AS reinterpreted_val FROM fuzz_test WHERE reinterpretAsUInt64(val) = ALL (SELECT reinterpretAsUInt64('test' || id) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM fuzz_test) AS sub);
SELECT DISTINCT id, reinterpretAsUInt64(num) AS reinterpreted_num FROM fuzz_test WHERE val LIKE '%' || reinterpretAsUInt64(num) || '%' AND dt < NOW() ORDER BY reinterpreted_num;

WITH (SELECT reinterpretAsUInt64(SUM(num)) FROM fuzz_test) AS total_sum SELECT id, total_sum, reinterpretAsUInt64(num) FROM fuzz_test WHERE num > 0 AND total_sum = ALL (SELECT total_sum FROM fuzz_test WHERE dt > '2023-01-01 00:00:00');

SELECT id, reinterpretAsUInt64(num) AS reinterpreted_num FROM fuzz_test WHERE reinterpretAsUInt64(num) = ALL (SELECT value FROM (SELECT reinterpretAsUInt64(NULLIF(num, 0)) AS value FROM fuzz_test WHERE val LIKE 'test%') AS sub);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, reinterpretAsUInt64(dt) AS reinterpreted_date FROM fuzz_test;

SELECT temp.id, reinterpretAsUInt64(val) AS reinterpreted_val FROM temp_test temp JOIN fuzz_test fuzz ON temp.id = fuzz.id WHERE fuzz.num > 1 AND temp.reinterpreted_date = ALL (SELECT reinterpretAsUInt64(dt) FROM fuzz_test WHERE dt < '2023-01-02 00:00:00');
SELECT dt, reinterpretAsUInt64(SUM(reinterpretAsUInt64(num))) AS total_reinterpreted FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY dt HAVING reinterpretAsUInt64(SUM(num)) > 10;
